title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 176.520 - Associations exempt from provisions of insurance law
text:
176.520.  Associations exempt from provisions of insurance law. — Any association organized under the provisions of sections 176.500 to 176.540 shall be exempt from all provisions of other insurance laws of this state, not only in governmental relations but for every other purpose.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1387 § 5)
